underlying_goal: Implement custom theme live color propagation, fix dark theme toggle contrast issues, improve preference category header styling, and manage git branches cleanly across multiple feature/fix branches
friction_detail: Git squash rebasing went wrong initially (wrong branch, commits mixed up), required a reset and rebuild; subagent spec reviewers gave false negatives multiple times.
brief_summary: User wanted custom theme live color updates, dark theme toggle fixes, preference header styling improvements, and clean git branch management across multiple PRs — most was achieved with some friction during git history rewriting.
